title: Lead Instructional Designer at Schoolnet India

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Schoolnet India
jsonLd.description:
Schoolnet India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Schoolnet India:
Schoolnet India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Schoolnet India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
